sections.description: The AI management layer for WordPress (MCP tools for AI agents).
sections.changelog:
2.13.7

  • OPcache self-heal: automatically reset OPcache after plugin installs/updates so the MCP connector never regresses to stale code.

2.13.6

  • Connect page now stores, lists and revokes connections (previously created credentials were saved but never shown).

2.13.5

  • Fix Claude Desktop 1.17377+ tools/list rejection (properties emitted as {} not []).

2.13.4

  • Fix extension subpage toolbar spacing (no longer flush to card edges).

2.13.3

  • Fix Extensions card layout.

sections.description: GA4, Search Console and PageSpeed reporting via Site Kit.
sections.changelog:
1.6.4

  • Description update; updater version fix.

1.6.3

  • Settings moved to AI Nexus subpage.

1.4.1

  • Self-hosted updater: native WordPress "Update now" button via the public manifest (no wp-config token).

sections.description: Manage the Avada theme from AI Nexus (read-only Global Options to start).
Manage Elementor from AI Nexus (status to start).
sections.changelog:
1.9.0

  • Template export/import: native Elementor .json format, export inline or to a file, import from payload or URL (cross-site).

1.8.1
